posts.text: Big shout out to @HUMensBB for bringing home a WIN against UMBC! Way to represent for HBCUs!

Is the GOP in serious trouble?
piped.video/hZEn785lM6A

Rep. Kevin Kiley and I speak on all things politics! Join the conversation by calling in before 8PM and giving us your take! 

☎️ Call: 866-967-6887

🚨 TONIGHT: The country is moving FAST and I need YOUR voice on this:

- The SAVE Act...
- Oil prices going UP...

And somehow we’re supposed to believe everything is under control?!

I don’t think so.

📞 CALL IN: 866-967-6887

Let’s talk about it LIVE on Straight Shooter @SIRIUSXM!

We are in the SECOND HALF …trust me, we are just getting warmed up! 

CALL THE SHOW: 888-623-3646
LISTEN NOW: sxm.app.link/MadDogRadio
You know what time it is!!! Call in today from 1pm - 3pm EST!!! Don’t sit on your take, SAY IT!

The SAVE Act is sparking major debate across the country!
Is this about protecting election integrity… or restricting voter access? 

Here's a way to get your voice heard: Record or text your political take for my Straight Shooter Show every Wednesday at 6pm -8pm EST! bit.ly/4sSoDQ4

Video
Make sure you tune this morning! We are LIVE!
Oil prices rising. Flights delayed. Markets shaky. How much of this war is about energy control?
Did the U.S. enter this war on its own terms or because of allies?
Sound ON! piped.video/o9izGcOO0vg?si=wYaz…
They are the team to beat in the AFC! piped.video/OuQp53Itmus?si=lwvy…

The clock is ticking and we are in the second hour of the show! The phone lines open until 3PM! Keep the calls coming if you’ve got something to say about the biggest stories in sports, Holla at your boy!

The lines are open and the 🎙️ mic is waiting. I am LIVE on 
@MadDogRadio (Ch. 82) until 3pm! Agree with me or Disagree with me?  I want to hear your best take TODAY! 

📲 CALL: (888-623-3646)
🎧 LISTEN: sxm.app.link/SASonSXM

Video

So…….Questions can’t be asked? We can’t be skeptical about anything, having legitimate questions about what is happening, why and how effective or efficient we’re being? To do such a thing is simply because of TDS? Hegseth never ceases to amaze. Why not just ask the press to wear Pom poms!


America Red Voice 🇺🇸 (@AmericaRedVoice)

SecDef Pete Hegseth stares right at the press and goes scorched earth, spelling out their insanity. I could watch this all day.

"You, and I mean specifically YOU, th
SWING! piped.video/dk9vRIryac0?si=DgAd…

I’m LIVE on The Stephen A. Smith Show right now on SiriusXM @MadDogRadio  (Ch. 82) until 3pm! 

You’ve got takes.
You’ve got opinions.

📞: (888-623-3646)
📻: sxm.app.link/MadDogRadio

Holla at your boy!

Video

A lot happen over the weekend and I want to hear your thoughts! Don’t sit there just thinking about your take, share it: 

📲 CALL THE SHOW: 888-623-3646
🎧 LISTEN NOW: sxm.app.link/MadDogRadio
Aaawwwwwwww! Hell Yeah Bednar! @tatis_jr……gone with the Strikeout. Next…..Marte out on a 78-mph curveball. That’s what the hell I’m talking about!!!
Whoa! @bryceharper3’s bat speed didn’t look slow on that double, though :-). USA gotta score here though. Severino is pitching his ass off for the DR!
Trump Is F**KING UP! Stephen A. Goes Off - “Not What America Is Supposed to Be!"
Baseball is in a phenomenal place! The World Baseball Classic isn't going anywhere.
This made me feel like a kid again
“STOP CRYING!” Kevin Frazier CLAPS BACK at Critics of Hollywood Politics
Stephen A. ERUPTS on Government Shutdown: ‘This Is a DAMN Joke!’
BLOCKBUSTER Trade! Jaylen Waddle to Broncos | “Denver Is the Team to Beat!”
Seth Greenberg SHOCKS Stephen A. With His NCAA Tournament Analysis
Stephen A. Reveals His Final Four + BLASTS NCAA Bracket Seeding! 🔥
SWING THE DAMN BAT! Stephen A. GOES OFF on Juan Soto After WBC Controversy
My mission is to impact others
Tune into Straight Shooter every Wednesday at 6:00pm - 8:00pm EST!
How is Tyreek Hill doing?
John Oliver …Are you ready to comment?!
You gotta be better then that!
I mean we talked about it all...Watch all my sports interviews on YouTube. Gus, thank you for stopping by brother!
The big political risk is…
I am so thankful for the inaugural BFOA Broadcast Personality of the Year Award and Judge Judy was in the house! My mission is to impact others and I won't stop.
On Monday, March 9, I received the Broadcast Personality of the Year Award. I made sure my family and team were by my side to celebrate such a special moment.
I can’t believe this!!
Is it America First?  My political take is on YouTube right now. Join the conversation, I want to know what you think.
